title: Remodeled Cactus
description: A new cactus 100% vanilla. No optifine required!
body:
A new cactus, 100% vanilla. No optifine required!

I changed the base model of the cactus to have more variants.
There are now 4 different models with new textures.

The cactus textures are from [Blockstates+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockstates)
